description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Configurator that runs on push to master and development branches, on pull requests to those branches, and allows manual dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on both windows-latest and macos-latest environments. For each environment, it checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.9, installs dependencies from requirements.txt and pyinstaller, builds the OpenFFBoard Configurator using pyinstaller, and uploads the resulting artifact.
